text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I escort Hishi Amazon to the infirmary after she
suffers an injury during training.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, I don't need to be patched up. It's
nothing serious.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We're just wasting time here, so let's get back to
training.
choice_data_list: Let them treat you for my peace of mind.
Let's refocus real quick and then get back at it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm telling you, it's not that bad... Ouch.
choice_data_list: So it does hurt after all.
So it does hurt after all.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't—well... it does hurt a little, but this
should heal up in no time!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We can't put on the brakes every time I get a
little scuffed up. Sometimes it's better to push on,
you know?
choice_data_list:
What if one of your dorm residents said the
same thing?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Well, I would scold her good and make her rest!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, dang it. You got me there.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Fine, I'll rest up and take care of myself... You
happy now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After having her injuries treated, she gives herself
plenty of time to rest.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I get your point! I can't let the others see
me lookin' so pathetic.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I won't push myself too hard, so—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Owww!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ugh... This isn't good.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I can walk, but running's a whole different story...
choice_data_list: Let's lay off the training till you're better.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, all right. I can't be makin' my injury
worse when I've got so many students lookin' up
to me as a role model.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon puts her impatience aside and rests
up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'll be the one to decide how I—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry, I take that back, Teach. Could you tape
it up for me?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Not exactly, but it feels a bit off.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I need to get back in tip-top shape if I want to
keep on training.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I'm always telling the younger students to
take their injuries seriously.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tape up her injury tightly, and we finish training
without further incident.
